//: Remote plugin config for the AgentCore-hosted control plane. Point `url` at your AgentCore Runtime invocation endpoint (URL-encode the runtime ARN). Claude's connector performs the OAuth handshake using the RFC 9728 protected-resource metadata that AgentCore serves at the /.well-known/oauth-protected-resource path of this endpoint. Replace REGION and the encoded ARN with the values from `agentcore status`.
